metaTitle: Unit Converter — Free Online Length, Weight, Temperature & More
metaDescription: Convert units instantly — length, weight, temperature, volume, speed and more. 100% free, works offline, and no login required.

howto.description: Select from Length, Weight, Temperature, Volume, Speed, and more.
Type the number you want to convert into the input box.
All unit conversions update in real time as you type.

why: Covers 6 categories — Length, Weight, Temperature, Volume, Speed, Area
All conversions update instantly as you type
Works completely offline — perfect for travel
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.a: Length, Weight, Temperature, Volume, Speed, and Area are all supported with the most commonly used units in each category.
All conversions use standard conversion factors and are accurate to 6 significant figures.
Yes. Once the page is loaded, the converter works completely offline. Perfect for travel or areas with poor signal.
No. Everything runs entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

proTips: Traveling to the US? Use the Length converter to quickly switch between km and miles.
Cooking with a foreign recipe? Use the Volume converter to switch between cups, ml, and liters.
The Temperature converter is great for checking weather forecasts in Celsius vs Fahrenheit.
troubleshooting: If results show many decimal places, that is normal for precise unit conversions.
For temperature, make sure to select the correct source unit (Celsius, Fahrenheit, or Kelvin).
